channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 560,000 — Prime Location 5 Bedroomed House for Sale - Highlands (Highlands, Harare North)
item.description: USD 560,000 — Highlands, Harare North. 5 beds, 3 baths. Prime Location 5 Bedroomed House for Sale - Highlands. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
